Typecheck errors are all pre-existing (in `AITutorChat.tsx` and `Database.ts`), none from my changes.
- Unread count badge (red dot with count, hidden when 0, caps at 99+)
- Click toggles open/close, resets unread count when opening
- Status indicator dot (green `var(--color-success)` when online, gray `var(--color-muted)` when away)
- `isOpen`/`unreadCount` persisted in `localStorage` under `ai-tutor-chat-state`, survives page navigations
- Extracts the `<header>` from Layout.tsx into a dedicated component
- Accepts `onMenuToggle` prop for the sidebar open/close
All 191 tests pass, no new type errors introduced.

[✓] Modify ChatIcon.tsx to connect ChatPopup visibility toggle
[✓] Create ChatPopup.tsx with messenger-style chat popup component
TypeScript compiles cleanly. ESLint config is project-level (not a concern for our changes). All 191 tests pass. Let me update the todo.
**Created** `src/components/aiTutor/ChatPopup.tsx` (489 lines) — Messenger-style floating chat popup with:
- **Conversation bubbles** — user right-aligned (primary bg), AI left-aligned (surface-alt bg) with bot/ user avatars
- **Typing indicator** — three bouncing dots with staggered animation delays
- **Smooth open/close** animation via CSS keyframes, portaled to `document.body`
- **6 quick reply buttons** — Teach me this, Quiz me, Practice now, Generate exercise, Explain my mistake, Remind me later — each triggers a simulated AI response
- **Minimize** (close button in header), **Expand** (navigates to `/tutor`), **Clear chat** (delete icon)
- **All theme variables** (`--color-surface`, `--color-primary`, `--color-text`, etc.) — dark/light mode ready
- **Message timestamps** — relative time (Just now, 5m ago, time-of-day, date+time)

**Modified** `src/components/aiTutor/ChatIcon.tsx` — Added import and renders `<ChatPopup isOpen={isOpen} onClose={handleToggle} />` alongside the headbar button. Toggle state (open/close, unread count) already persisted to localStorage.
- **Escape key** closes popup, focus trap on open
**Validation**: TypeScript compiles clean (`npx tsc --noEmit`), all 191 tests pass.
- **Mobile full-screen** mode (auto-detected at <640px, full viewport, no border-radius)

[✓] Modify ChatPopup.tsx to integrate proactive message engine
[✓] Create src/services/ProactiveMessageEngine.ts with message types, settings, engine class, scheduling
[✓] Verify implementation compiles and passes tests
The local-first proactive message engine module with:
- Rich `ProactiveMessage` interface with priority, actions, snooze support
1. `checkDueReview` — vocabulary due for review via spaced repetition
- 8 message categories with per-category toggle in settings
- `ProactiveMessageSettings` with quiet hours, daily limits, browser notification toggle
3. `checkWeakSkillWarning` — weak points, recent mistakes, low exercise scores
10. `checkTopicPracticeSuggestion` — context-aware suggestions per page (vocabulary, writing, speaking, reading, mistakes, dashboard)
- In-app listeners for the chat popup
- Returns guidance message when API key is missing
- Tracks triggered-per-day to enforce daily limits
- Stores messages in localStorage with MAX_STORED_MESSAGES cap
- Documents local-first limitations clearly (no cloud push)
- Priority-high messages styled with warning colors
- Displays pending proactive messages in a "Tutor Suggestions" section between the message area and quick actions
- Each proactive message card shows title, message, action button, dismiss/snooze controls
- New messages from the engine auto-appear via the `onMessage` listener
- Action buttons trigger navigation, quick actions, or add assistant messages

- **`ExtensionProactiveAssistant` class** with four trigger generators: `onTextSelected()`, `onYouTubePage()`, `onWordSaved()`, `onArticlePage()` — each producing a rule-based suggestion with an actionable button
- **`detectAndSuggest()`** — context-aware detection that checks page metadata for video platforms and article-length English text
- **Privacy**: no silent full-page reads, explicit `clearPageData()`, lightweight client-side language detection, minimal metadata collection
- **Settings** with master toggle + per-category toggles + cooldown + daily max limits, persisted to localStorage
- **Integration** with the existing `proactiveMessageEngine` and `LocalChatMemory` for dismissing/snoozing
- **Documentation**: header comments clearly state local-first limitations, privacy rules, and that the extension cannot deliver messages when the browser/extension is closed
